// THE ORIGIN STORY

The Human Behind The Machine

"Yes, There's An Actual Person Here. Surprising, I Know."

Hi, I'm Gaurav Singh Bisht — and I arrived at AI the scenic route: through finance, spreadsheets, and an almost unhealthy fascination with why systems behave the way they do. Born in the mountains of Uttarakhand, I'm currently pursuing my MBA in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at Graphic Era University — with a CGPA of 8.7, because apparently my passion for machines doesn't stop me from caring about grades.

Right now, I'm in full-on mad scientist mode: architecting end-to-end data pipelines on Databricks and AWS, training ML models that actually solve real problems, and diving deep into Generative AI and agentic workflows. My MBA isn't just a degree — it's my launchpad for building AI systems at the intersection of business intelligence and machine intelligence.

My mission? Bold, and I'll say it out loud: I want to become one of the top AI & Data Engineering professionals in India within the next 5 years — building intelligent systems that don't just crunch numbers, but fundamentally change how decisions are made in finance, healthcare, and enterprise. Ambitious? Absolutely. Deterred by that? Not even slightly. 🚀

// WHERE THE MAGIC HAPPENED

The Career Chronicles

"Places That Trusted Me With Real Data. They Survived. Mostly."

Data Analyst
Anaptyss — Financial Services
📅 Aug 2024 – Jul 2025 · Gurugram, India
"Survived the world of AML/KYC compliance analytics — and came out with sharper dashboards, cleaner pipelines, and a significantly higher caffeine tolerance."
  • Boosted AML risk detection accuracy by 25% by analyzing customer transaction patterns using SQL, Power BI, and Advanced Excel.
  • Automated compliance reporting workflows using Generative AI tools, reducing manual effort by 20% and ensuring 100% audit readiness.
  • Delivered data-driven insights for KYC/AML compliance, coordinating cross-functional teams to meet stringent financial compliance standards.
SQLPower BIAML/KYCExcelGenerative AICompliance Analytics
Business Development Manager
AIESEC Dehradun — UN SDG Partner · World's Largest Youth NGO
📅 Aug 2025 – Present · Dehradun, India
"Turns out, managing humans is considerably harder than managing data. But I'm getting there, one partnership at a time."
  • Spearheaded business development for AIESEC's World's Largest Lesson (UN & UNICEF-backed), raising INR 1 Lakh in sponsorships and brand partnerships.
  • Led cross-functional teams, driving stakeholder negotiations and delivering SDG awareness to 500+ students.
  • Developed outreach strategies combining digital marketing with community engagement for measurable real-world impact.
LeadershipBusiness DevSDGFundraisingUN/UNICEF
Marketing Intern
Sports For All (SFA) · Remote Internship
📅 Sep 2023 – Oct 2023 · 2 months · Dehradun, India (Remote)
"Developed marketing strategies for a sports brand — because even data nerds need to understand how real humans make decisions."
  • Developed and implemented marketing strategies to drive brand awareness and revenue growth for the sports platform.
  • Managed social media accounts and created promotional materials, organizing engagement events for potential customers.
  • Conducted market research and analyzed consumer behavior, identifying customer segments and building targeted campaigns to generate leads.
  • Collaborated closely with the sales team to align marketing campaigns with revenue targets.
